title: The App Store
drDigitalIntro:
The App Store is where you download new apps safely.
• Every app is reviewed before it's listed.
• Browse by category, search by name, or see what's trending.
• Each app shows a description, ratings, and reviews.

playgroundTask.goal: You found an app in the store

steps.say: You're in the App Store. Click on 'Games' in the category list.
Click on Puzzle Quest to see its details.
Click 'Go to Store' to go back to the main store page.

drDigitalSuccess: You browsed the App Store! Categories help you discover apps, and each app page shows ratings and reviews.
drDigitalHint: Click a category to browse, then click an app name to see its details.
